title: Protein Aggregation Capture
steps: Add 5 µL of MagReSyn Hydroxyl Beads Resyn Biosciences to 1.5mL LoBind Eppendorf tube
Place tube on magnet and allow Microparticles to clear 00:00:10
Remove storage solution and discard
Equilibrate Microparticles by adding 100 µL 70% ACN Thermo Scientific and mix by gentle agitation
Place tube on magnet and allow Microparticles to clear 00:00:10
Remove supernatant and discard
Add 100 µL 70% ACN Thermo Scientific and mix by gentle agitation
Place tube on magnet and allow Microparticles to clear 00:00:10
Remove supernatant and discard
Add 2 µL sample in triplicate
Add Acetonitrile Contributed by users to a concentration of 70% and mix once by pipette to create a uniform suspension
Allow to rest 00:10:00
Place tube on magnet and allow Microparticles to clear 00:00:10
Remove supernatant and discard
Add 1 mL 100% ACN Thermo Scientific and incubate for 00:00:10
Add 1 mL 70% Ethanol Contributed by users and incubate for 00:00:10
Remove supernatant
Remove supernatant
Add 5 µg Trypsin P212121 Catalog #RP-T70010 and incubate for 04:00:00
Remove tube from magnet and add pH 8.5 Tris P212121 and mix throughly
Quench to a final concentration 1 % volume TFA Thermo Scientific
Mix and place samples on magnet for 00:01:00 and transfer supernatant to tubes
Wash beads with 50-100 µL 1 % volume TFA Thermo Scientific for 00:02:00 with continous mixing
Centrifuge tubes 20000 x g, °C, 10 minutes
Remove supernatant and pool with eluate from Step 13
Transfer supernatant to new tube and freeze down at -80 °C
creator: Mark Kinnin
